Apply waterproofing membrane system to the entire deck surface.
Conduct flood testing or integrity testing of the waterproofing membrane.
Lay protective screed or asphaltic layer over the membrane.
Survey and set out for track plinth/baseplate locations.
Construct concrete track plinths.
Install rails, fastenings, and sleepers/baseplates.
Perform initial rail alignment and thermic welding.
Final tamping, stressing, and alignment of track.
Install deck drainage system (scuppers, downpipes).
Install cable containment systems (ducts, troughs, and cable trays).
Install walkway and maintenance handrailing.
Pull and install power, signaling, and communication cables.
Install viaduct lighting poles and fixtures.
Install noise barriers and associated steelwork.
Install expansion joints at abutments and designated piers.
Apply final protective/aesthetic coating to parapet walls.
Install all required signage and line marking.
Conduct final cleaning and removal of all temporary works from the deck.
Perform joint quality inspection with the client/engineer (Punch Listing).
Rectify all identified defects/snags.
Final Handover Inspection and Demobilization.
